title: Orighty 6-Pack White Hand Towels - Quick Drying & Absorbent Microfibre Bathroom Hand Towel 16x28 inches - Lightweight & Thin White Towels - Multi Purpose for Gym, SPA, Hotel & Bathroom
features: [Super Soft] - Orighty white hand towels are exclusively crafted from microfibre, offering a remarkably soft and gentle touch. They are specifically designed to reduce any potential skin abrasion, making them ideal for individuals with sensitive skin. Experience the utmost comfort with these luxuriously soft hand towels. Please note that these towels are thinner and more breathable compared to others.

[Highly Absorbent&Fast Drying] - Our microfibre hand towels boast exceptional absorbency, capable of easily soaking up over 7 times their weight in water. With their generous 16x28’’ size, these bathroom hand towels provide ample surface area for quick drying. Additionally, these white towels are lint-free and exhibit remarkable durability.

[Easy Maintenance] - Our white towels are conveniently machine washable and reusable. Simply toss them in the washer and dryer, allowing for multiple uses. For optimal longevity, we recommend washing the towels in warm water and tumble dry at low temperatures.

[Multi-Purpose] - With their generous 16x28 size, these white towels are suitable for various purposes. They excel as gym towels, SPA towels, bath towels, face towels, and even cleaning cloths. Orighty hand towel sets are designed to fulfill your diverse daily needs.

[Durable Sewing Edge] - At Orighty, we prioritize quality and attention to detail for long-term satisfaction. Each hand towel is meticulously crafted with a durable sewn edge and premium microfibre material, ensuring an enhanced user experience while guaranteeing durability.
description: Product Description Ultra Soft&Skin-Friendly Orighty hand towels use premium microfibre material, super soft and skin-friendly, suitable for people with sensitive skin, especially for women and children. Premium microfibre can also significantly reduce skin abrasion. Highly Absorbent Microfibre material can easily soak up 7 times its weight water, set you free from the dampness and enjoy the dryness. Machine washable Orighty hand towels are machine washable and reusable, you can simply put them into the washer and dryer, and then reuse them hundreds of times. Decent Sewing edge Orighty focuses on delicate detail workmanship year-round, ensuring each towel can be decent on the premise of guaranteeing quality. Multi-Purpose These 16x28'' towels are big enough as gym towel, SPA towel, hotel towel, bath towel, face towel and even cleaning cloth. Orighty hand towel sets can easily fulfill your daily use.
